summary: Iteration 157: CI Load Tests & Ruff UP Auto-fix Verification - All 11 tests passed. Both tasks verified: (1) CI load tests integrated as hard gate with 11 @pytest.mark.ci_load tests passing, (2) Ruff UP safe auto-fix rules applied with 0 linting errors.

All core PMS endpoints working: health, login, dashboard, availability, bookings.
